title: HIMANTA BISWA SARMA TAKES OATH | INDIA'S LPG STOCK UPDATE | NEET UG 2026 CANCELLED - MAY 12, 2026
description:
India’s biggest news of 12 May 2026 in just 3 minutes. In today’s current affairs update, we cover Himanta Biswa Sarma taking oath as Assam CM for a second term, Hardeep Singh Puri’s big statement on India’s fuel supply, ISRO scientist Nandini Harinath’s Mangalyaan saree being displayed in a US space museum, NEET UG 2026 exam cancellation after paper leak allegations, Tata-Airbus C295 Made in India aircraft rollout buzz, Tamil Nadu CM Vijay’s decision to shut 717 TASMAC liquor shops, Arvind Kejriwal’s questions on India’s economy, and the Supreme Court’s Mahabharat remark on the ₹30,000 crore Kapur family dispute.

Watch this full video for today’s top India news, breaking news, political updates, economy news, defence news, education news and current affairs explained in simple language.
